description: This sporty black and red wallet from puma is strong and practical for everyday use. An unmissable, eye-catching puma logo on the front and funky asymmetrical opening give this wallet a unique style of it's own. Dimensions: 12cm x 10cm Has a velcro fastening One zip pocket for your loose change Three card slots Two small compartments and one large compartment for notes Care Wipe clean with a damp cloth when required Do not use detergent
